title: We Have a Centralization Issue
relevance_summary: Centralized infrastructure dependency affecting Layer 2 networks and wallets
red_flags: AWS US-EAST-1 DNS hiccup causing widespread Layer 2 network outages
summary: The AWS US-EAST-1 region's DNS hiccup caused multiple Layer 2 networks and wallet services to go offline, highlighting the reliance on centralized infrastructure in DeFi.
